items.title: Procore Drawing Zip Import
items.desc: Extract PDFs from Procore zip exports and route to project discipline folders. Handle revision superseding.

items.title: Batch WPQ/WPS Extraction
items.desc: Extract ~500 welding PDFs from D:\RAW_DATA\ using dual Sonnet + Opus shadow review pipeline.

items.title: Quality Manual Module 3 XML Authoring
items.desc: Author module3_output.xml from planning doc. 8 sections: Program Framework (3.1), Welding Quality (3.2), Training & Workforce (3.3), Testing & Calibration (3.4), CI/CAPA (3.5), Field Operations Manual (3.6), Vendor & Subcontractor Quality (3.7), Internal Audit (3.8).

items.title: Quality Manual Module 4 XML Authoring
items.desc: Author module4_output.xml from planning doc. ~50 SOPs across 11 categories with dual ID system (section 4.X + SOP-XXX-NNN). Reserved section ranges per category.

items.title: Windows Service (nssm)
items.desc: Run Waitress as auto-start Windows service instead of manual qms serve.

items.title: Scheduled OneDrive Sync
items.desc: Auto-run qms pipeline intake --sync on a schedule via Task Scheduler or service.

items.title: P-Number Prefix Disambiguation
items.desc: P- prefix maps to Mechanical but should be Plumbing for some projects. Need project-level override or smarter resolution.

items.title: v0.2 Phase 13 — Integrations & Automation (3 plans)
items.desc: Dashboard widgets + iCal calendar feed, cross-module credentials + bulk operations, license verification tracking with state board lookup, token-authenticated external API at /api/v1/. Completes v0.2 milestone.

items.title: System Tray App for Waitress Server Control
items.desc: pystray-based system tray icon with Start/Stop/Restart server, Open in Browser, health monitoring. Subprocess isolation, port conflict detection, external server awareness. CLI: qms tray.

items.title: v0.2 Phase 12 â€” Advanced CE & Multi-Credential (2 plans)
items.desc: CE provider & course catalog with cross-state applicability, CRUD modals, course browser with state/format filters. Employee credential portfolio with master-detail layout, CE progress bars. Catalog-linked credit entry.

items.title: v0.2 Phase 8 â€” Notifications & Task Management (2 plans)
items.desc: Rule-driven notification engine with 3 generators (expiration, CE deadline, renewal), CLI with 6 ops, 5 notification API endpoints, Teams webhook for critical alerts (Adaptive Card format), task queue UI panel on licenses dashboard with acknowledge/resolve actions.

items.title: v0.2 Phase 7 â€” Renewal Workflow & Events (2 plans)
items.desc: license_events table with 7 event types, fee tracking, auto-expire CLI, renewal API endpoint, event timeline UI on detail page, renewal modal, add-event modal. 25 tests.

items.title: v0.1 Phase 4 Plan 02 â€” Voice Transcription + Capture Review UI
items.desc: OpenAI Whisper voice transcription, Claude transcript analysis, capture review page at /quality/captures with inline editing. Completes phone-to-database pipeline (photos + voice notes). 9 new tests (26 total capture tests).

items.title: v0.2 Phase 6 â€” Foundation Hardening (3 plans)
items.desc: N+1 query fixes + audit trail, server-side pagination + input validation, API rate limiting (60/min per IP) + CSRF hardening (PUT/DELETE/PATCH + Origin validation). Completes security foundation for v0.2 License Compliance Platform.

items.title: Licenses Phase 3 â€” CE Workflow, Reporting & Compliance Dashboard
items.desc: Period-aware CE tracking (renewal window scoping), seed CE requirements for 9 key states, certificate file upload/download, CSV exports (licenses + CE compliance), compliance dashboard with health score cards, action items queue, and Chart.js horizontal stacked bar chart for CE progress by state. 3 new db functions, 5 new API routes, multipart file upload support.

items.title: Licenses Phase 2 â€” Drill-Down Navigation, Scope Mapping, CE Tracking
items.desc: State detail pages with board info and CE requirements. License detail pages with scope tags and CE credit progress tracking. 5 new schema tables (boards, scope_categories, license_scope_map, ce_requirements, ce_credits). Drill-down navigation: Map â†’ State â†’ License. Employee â†’ Qualifying Party terminology. Scope-to-license compliance gap detection. ~20 new DB functions, ~15 new API routes, 2 new templates.

items.title: License Schema â€” Business Entity + Employee Model
items.desc: Added business_entity column to state_licenses, separating company identity from employee link. Migration backfills from holder_name. Updated import specs, API, modal form, table, stats cards, and renewal timeline.

items.title: Mobile Capture Photo Pipeline (Phase 4, Plan 01)
items.desc: Claude vision photo analysis pipeline â€” scan OneDrive folder for construction photos, analyze with AI, create structured quality issues with attached images. CLI command with dry-run, folder override, project assignment. capture_log dedup table. 17 tests.

items.title: State Licenses Module â€” Phase 1 Expansion
items.desc: Bulk CSV import via shared import engine (10 columns, 2-level match), US state SVG map with click-to-filter, expiration alerts (30/60/90 day bands), Chart.js renewal timeline. Builds on base CRUD module.

items.title: Quality Intelligence Dashboard (Phase 3)
items.desc: Chart.js analytics (by type/status/trade), filterable browse page with semantic search (vectordb + SQL LIKE fallback), 4 new API endpoints, sub-nav integration. Completes Phase 3 of Quality Intelligence Platform milestone.

items.title: Quality Intelligence Dashboard (Phase 3, Plan 01)
items.desc: Flask blueprint at /quality/ with stats cards (total/open/in-progress/critical), recent issues table, issues-by-project breakdown, JSON APIs (/api/stats, /api/issues with filters), BU filtering, shield+checkmark nav icon. Zero custom CSS.

items.title: Procore Bulk Import Pipeline (Phase 2)
items.desc: CSV import engine with header auto-mapping, normalization, dedup. Batch import with project-from-filename resolution. Attachment URL capture. Quality issues vector indexing. Pipeline auto-detection for observation CSVs. 44 tests.

items.title: Quality Issues Foundation (Phase 1)
items.desc: Unified quality issues schema (8 tables), root cause taxonomy, normalization config, audit trail, issue linking, tagging, corrective actions. Quality module registered in SCHEMA_ORDER.

items.title: Unified QR Code System
items.desc: Shared QR utility in core/ for encoding self-contained metadata on welding forms (WPS/PQR/WPQ/BPS/BPQ/BPQR) and quality manual exports. Branded with nav_bg color, field ordering per doc type.

items.title: Pre-Approved Coupons + AWS SWPS Import
items.desc: Quick-select bar for 11 pre-approved coupon configs (W1-W7 welding, B1-B2 brazing, S1-S2 structural) that auto-fill all cascade fields. Imported 2 AWS Standard WPS records (SWPS-B2.1-1-022 SMAW, SWPS-B2.1-1-020 FCAW-G) with full child data. New schema table, seed functions, API endpoint.

items.title: Welding Certification Request Web Form
items.desc: Web-based WCR intake form replacing Power Automate. Material-first cascade (Material â†’ Process â†’ WPS â†’ Position), welder search with auto-fill, 1-4 coupons per request, duplicate qualification warnings, project search, new welder registration toggle. List view with status badges. 9 new API endpoints, 2 templates.

items.title: Quality Manual PDF Export
items.desc: WeasyPrint-based PDF export for quality manual modules. Professional cover page, TOC with page numbers, all content block types, SIS branding. CLI (qms docs export), web download endpoint, and in-page PDF button. Customizable via standalone Jinja2+CSS template.

items.title: Contextualized Document Import â€” Workforce MVP
items.desc: 4-step import wizard (Upload â†’ Map Columns â†’ Review Action Plan â†’ Execute) with shared import engine, workforce-specific specs (15 columns, 4-level match, separation detection), and full web UI. Dark mode hover contrast fix included.

items.title: UI Restructure: Time Tracker + Project Hub + Home Dashboard
items.desc: Major restructure: extracted Time Tracker module (admin-only), moved BU CRUD to Settings, added project hub detail pages, operational home dashboard with activity feed, linked users to employees, cleaned up EMP- numbering.

items.title: Scheduled Publishing for The Observatory
items.desc: Draft/scheduled/published workflow for blog posts. Datetime picker in editor, auto-publish on read (lazy), three-state badges, mutual exclusion between Published toggle and schedule picker.

items.title: Landing Page + The Observatory Blog
items.desc: Branded landing page with Navigator Penguin mascot, module quick-link cards, and The Observatory astronomy-themed blog. Blog admin in Settings. Markdown support.

items.title: 07609 Freshpet Full Drawing Extraction
items.desc: 286 sheets across 11 disciplines extracted via SIS pipeline. 72 equipment, 673 lines, 372 instruments. Cross-checker module created.

items.title: Pipeline Cross-Checker Module
items.desc: Reusable cross_checker.py for detecting material mismatches, size discrepancies, and duplicate tags across drawings.

items.title: Admin System Architecture Map
items.desc: Secret /admin/system-map page with live DB stats, full system visual, roadmap tracker.

items.title: Workforce Employee Sheet UI
items.desc: Web UI for viewing employee data from SIS imports.

items.title: Fillable WPQ PDF Extraction
items.desc: Form-field extraction for fillable WPQ PDFs using extraction pipeline.

items.title: SIS Import Employee Number Fix
items.desc: Preserve real employee numbers during SIS field location imports.

items.title: Welder Profile Archive/Restore
items.desc: Admin-only archive and restore button on welder profile pages.

items.title: Module 4 SOP Architecture Planning
items.desc: Comprehensive Module 4 architecture: 50 SOPs across 11 categories, dual ID system (4.X + SOP-XXX-NNN), reserved section ranges, standard XML template, cross-reference maps from M2/M3, 4-phase authoring plan.

items.title: Module 3 Quality Programs Architecture
items.desc: Expanded Module 3 from welding-only to 7 independent quality programs (3.2-3.8) with program framework (3.1). Bridge between M2 project procedures and M4 SOPs. Programs: Welding, Training, Testing & Calibration, CI/CAPA, Field Manual, Vendor Quality, Internal Audit.

items.title: Federated Documentation (CLAUDE.md Restructure)
items.desc: Split CLAUDE.md from 276 lines to 59-line contract + 3 reference files in .planning/ (architecture.md, cli-reference.md, development-guide.md). Corrected stale facts, deleted 651-line RESTRUCTURE_PLANNING_PROMPT.md.

recently_completed.description: Auto-restart on crash, icon color states, double-click browser open, log file output, startup toast notification
